title: Creamy Tangy Midnight Tofu Stir-fry
description: A midnight craving Uruguayan dish featuring creamy tofu with a tangy flavor profile, ideal for whole30-friendly meals.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Select firm tofu for best results.

ingredients.name: Sesame seeds
ingredients.notes: Use roasted sesame seeds for added depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: Chili peppers
ingredients.notes: Add more if you prefer a spicier dish.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Finely minced for maximum aroma and flavor.

ingredients.name: Sesame seed oil
ingredients.notes: Use high smoke point to prevent burning during stir-frying.

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: For initial cooking to release the flavors of tofu and sesame seeds.

instructions: Preheat your wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add olive oil and sesame seed oil, swirling to coat.
Crack open chili peppers and remove seeds if preferred. Finely chop garlic and finely grind sesame seeds.
Gently press the tofu with a paper towel on both sides to absorb excess water. Cut into small cubes.

Add tofu cubes to hot pan, sprinkle over minced garlic, add chopped chili peppers (with seeds removed), and pour in olive oil mixture. Stir-fry for 3-5 minutes or until tofu is golden brown on all sides.
Pour in sesame seed oil, stir well and continue cooking until the tofu is crispy and golden.
In a separate pan, whisk together soy sauce and water to create a light glaze. Pour over the tofu and chili mixture, tossing gently to coat evenly.
Reduce heat to low and let simmer for 1-2 minutes until most of the liquid evaporates, allowing flavors to meld together.
Serve hot as is or with your preferred side dishes.
